_comment: Example episode manifest for the cluster_validation gate. Lifted from the attributing-speakers skill example with the 2026-05-02 fingerprint additions. Use as a template for new episodes; do NOT commit real personal audio output to this repo (see .gitignore). Voice profile paths are placeholders for v2 (voice-embedding signal).

fingerprint_phrases: I have a fleet of trading bots

_notes: DJI Mic 3 alternating-mode capture invalidates channel routing for the Josh hike (skill rule 2026-05-03). When inferred via the audio-signal-first speaker map, ALL mic_channel fields should be null. Channel routing weights collapse to 0; content + addressee + role + voice carry the signal.
David has no mic (mic_channel=null) — content/addressee weighted higher.

Validate against the attribute.py reference: the prototype run on this manifest with the labeled unified transcript should produce A=Josh, B=Chris, C=David per 2026-05-03 lesson. (cluster sizes by descending count after Phase 1.5 ECAPA: A=2922 chunks, B=1294, C=817.)
